meta.description: On-demand DIGITAL-SIGNAGE slide set for office/lobby screens. Trigger via Telegram (/signage <topic>) or manually (form: topic, audience, number of slides). AI writes short slide copy; Render builds one 1920×1080 HTML page per slide; Gotenberg screenshot renders each to PNG (one per slide); a pure-JS store ZIP writer bundles them into a .zip written to /reports/awareness/signage and returned in chat.

parameters.formDescription: Pick a topic and how many slides, then submit. Produces 1920×1080 PNG slides as a .zip bundle.

values.placeholder: Used if set / if Topic = Custom

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "{{ $env.OLLAMA_DEFAULT_MODEL || 'llama3.1:8b' }}",
  "stream": false,
  "keep_alive": "10m",
  "options": { "temperature": 0.5, "num_predict": 2000 },
  "messages": [ {"role":"system","content":"You are a security-awareness designer creating copy for digital-signage slides (screens in offices/lobbies). For the given topic and audience produce a SINGLE valid JSON object. Keys: title; slides (an array with EXACTLY the requested number of items, each {headline (very short, max 5 words, punchy), sub (one short supporting line, max ~10 words), points (array of 0-2 ultra-short tips, max ~5 words each)}). Each slide must stand alone and be readable from across a room. Plain, bold, action-oriented language; no jargon. Do NOT use markdown code fences. Output ONLY the JSON object."}, {"role":"user","content": {{ JSON.stringify('Create copy for ' + ($json.slides||5) + ' digital-signage slides on the topic: ' + ($json.topic || 'phishing') + '. Audience: ' + ($json.audience||'All staff') + '. Return exactly ' + ($json.slides||5) + ' slides.') }} } ]
}
